title: ユニコーンSの後に・砂塵を越えて

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Whew... That felt great! Did ya see me, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I think this is how I'm supposed to be
runnin' these races!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I reckon we've done enough training to take on
the big ones! Victory's gonna be mine!

Taiki Shuttle performs amazingly well, regardless
of the dirt track.

I've never doubted her abilities, but this level of
growth is honestly shocking!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So, Trainer! Does this mean we can finally go to—

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
First, we celebrate our hard work with some good
steak and carrot juice. ♪
